MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for UD settlement. Judge: Ollie Marie Victoire, Clerk: P. Dias, Reporter: Patricia Dowling. Steven Williams, Esq. represented Plaintiff Anthony Wilson Belmonte. The case settled per written stipulation of parties, not read into the record. Trial date is vacated.
